name: Commander Kai Chen
learned: Commander Kai Chen has a military background with significant experience in space operations. His analytical mindset makes him a valuable asset in assessing risks and ensuring the mission remains on track.
currently: Commander Kai Chen is focused on maintaining the crew’s safety amidst the uncertainties of the alien vessel. He advocates for careful exploration and is often found in the Command Deck, reviewing assessments and preparing contingency plans.
lifestyle: Commander Chen follows a disciplined routine: he wakes up at 5am for physical training, reviews mission protocols, meets with Captain Ruiz for strategy sessions, has lunch at 1pm, spends afternoons evaluating research data, and typically goes to bed by 10pm.
living_area: Deep-Space Mission Station:Space Station Living Quarters:Crew Dormitory:Room 401
